title: Module 1
content:
Brief history of plastics: - Advantages and disadvantages - thermoplastics
and thermosets. Monomer preparation, polymerisation, properties and
application of LDPE, HDPE, cross linked and chlorinated PE and PP, PVC,
polyvinylidene chloride

title: Module 2
content:
Monomer preparation, polymerisation, properties and application of
PVA, polyvinyl acetate, PMMA, PET PAN, PC, nylon-5,6,6-6,6-12,
aromatic polyamide and polyacrylamide, regenerated cellulose, and epoxies

title: Module 3
content:
Monomer preparation, polymerisation, properties and application of
PU, PTFE, polyvinyl fluoride, polyvinylidene fluoride, PS, HIPS, ABS,
SAN, and polyacetal. Thermoplastic polyesters, unsaturated polyester
laminating resins, polyester moulding compositions, fibre and film forming
polyesters.

title: Module 4
content:
Monomer preparation, polymerisation, properties and application of PF,
preparation of phenol formaldehyde moulding powders, PF laminates.
novolac, resol, MF and UF resins
